scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @book-club/server && npm run build --workspace @book-club/client
scripts.dev:e2e: sh -c 'for p in 3000 5173; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done; npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:e2e --workspace @book-club/server && concurrently "ENABLE_TEST_AUTH=true NODE_ENV=test CLIENT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm run dev --workspace @book-club/server" "npm run dev --workspace @book-club/client -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"'
scripts.e2e: sh -c 'npm run dev:e2e > /tmp/bookclub-e2e.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID" EXIT; sleep 15; npx playwright test'
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @book-club/server && npm run test --workspace @book-club/client
